---
title: "Alexander Macmillan"
---

## Alexander Macmillan

**Dates:** (1818-1896)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

He married (1851) Caroline Brimley (d. 1871). The most important as well as the best documented of CMY’s publishers; he agreed 1877 her assignment of copyrights. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from April 21st [1893]
- Letter from Oct 11th 1888
- Letter from March 1st 1880
- Letter from Feb 20th 1880
- Letter from Aug 8th 1879
- Letter from July 12th 1879
- Letter from [11 July 1879]
- Letter from July 9th 1879
- Letter from July 9th 1879
- Letter from July 4th/1879
- Letter from June 24th [1879]
- Letter from Jany 29th 1879
- Letter from Jan 1st 1879
- Letter from Novr 22d 1878
- Letter from Novr 10th 1878
- Letter from Sept 16th 1878
- Letter from June 17th 1878
- Letter from May 10th 1878
- Letter from 24 November 1877 
- Letter from Novr 22nd 1877 

*... and 224 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
